Provider Treatment Notes

Brooke Welsh, WHNP March 25, 2026

Bryce continues to show outstanding response to hormone pellet therapy. Current testosterone levels of 853 ng/dl represent optimal range for his age and symptoms. Patient reports significant improvements in energy, sleep quality, and overall well-being.

Treatment Plan: Continue current pellet schedule. Next insertion likely needed in June-July 2026 based on absorption patterns. Maintain current supplement protocol with excellent adherence rates.
